segment.source: Renders a wide page-opening banner with an optional background image behind a scrim, a large headline, a short description, and one call-to-action button, in default, dark, or primary color variants. Use it for: page or campaign titles that come with a mood image, a topic intro plus one action, cover-style section openers. Prefer 'Hero Section' when the source has a full pitch with two actions; use 'Page Header' for plain titles without imagery.
